TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_pangciw, title = pangciw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/pangciw} }

S.FORM: pangciw u kamu nu Sakizaya, anu yakiw nu Lipun. kakiliman mimali tu pangciw u masakaputay a nipimali, sainayay a tademaw a sasiwaay tu tusaay a mimaliay i cacayay nu mamaliyan mimali. anu mipangciw tu ku mimaliay izaw ku midakepay izaw ku misimaway, anu midakapay matineng mimalit tu nipiwait tu malit maasek, anu makaasek maduba tu sakatukuh i sakasepat a Â£òÂåÖ, mamin dubaen tu katukuh i sayaway nu nipimalit cacayay kuni kaalaan nu mali; u misimaway maadih tu mali matineng mikiling tu dadakepan tu mali sisa yamiasekay tu mali madakep ci niza nayay tu. matatemec hen, tusaay a mimaliay malaliyun mimali atu midakep atu misimaway, sakasiwaay (nu wawaay kina enem, nu masakapahay kina pituay ) anu cima ku yadahay a nipimali kuyza ku kata'. anu siwaay hen kuni pimali maleca kuni malian, muliawaca hay nika katukuh tu nika tademecan tu kata'. misasengiay tu pangciw u leiciw. nilacul laylay u sasakamuwan tu nu mali, izaw ku kamu tu nu nimalian sa musaliwday a mali, nu Amuhuan a kamu nu wawa a sapilatlat. u nikingkiwan tu mihcaan sa, alaw katinengan u mali atu u saliwday a mali namakayni i dengciw. 1834 a mihcaan, Amuhuan nu pusidung tahkal ku cacayay a milatlatay a cudad, sakamu sa tu mali nu latlat, caay kalalucek ku nisulitan tu wayway. nu Amuhuan a hitay ci Abner Doubleday salucek sa misalucek tu mali tu sayaway, nika caay kalucek musakamu, tina kawawan tu sasakamuwan caay kalalucek kina kamu, sisa nayay i laylay a cudad kina kawaw. 1845 a mihcaan, Alexander Cartwright misulit tu cudad nu latlatay, sulit saan tu nisulitan, yadah patadengaay kina malian tu sayaway kyu malucek, tina kawaw tu sulit izaw ku lucekay sa, u sakanamuhan tu nu aydaay a tademaw kina latlat tu mamalian. 1846 a mihcaan, sayaway malingatu misasulit tu sapimatademecay a nipimali : New York Knickerbockers atu New York NineÔºõmatademec i State of New Jersey a Elysian a mamalian. 1865 a mihcaan namakatimul malalayis satu mamin sa, namakatimulay a Amuhuan a tademaw izaw tu ku masasudemec tu mali, i mamalian nu Amuhuan katuud ku nu nakamuwan tu mali. 1869 a mihcaan, sayaway nu mimaliay mapatideng ku ngangan han tu Reds Hall of Fame hosts Vintage(u ngangan niza ayza Cincinnati Reds). Amuhuan izaw ku nipisalamal tu nu dumaan a mali tu nu Amuhuan, caay kalecacad ku mipisalamal, mahida nu sapaday a mali.
S.PHON: pa≈ã ¶iw u kamu nu sakizaja, anu jakiw nu r~…æipun. kakir~…æiman mimar~…æi tu pa≈ã ¶iw u masakaputaj a nipimar~…æi, sainajaj a tad…ômaw a sasiwaaj tu tusaaj a mimar~…æiaj i ¶a ¶ajaj nu mamar~…æijan mimar~…æi. anu mipa≈ã ¶iw tu ku mimar~…æiaj izaw ku midak…ôpaj izaw ku misimawaj, anu midakapaj matin…ô≈ã mimar~…æit tu nipiwait tu mar~…æit maas…ôk, anu makaas…ôk maduba tu sakatukuƒß i sakas…ôpat a **, mamin duba…ôn tu katukuƒß i sajawaj nu nipimar~…æit ¶a ¶ajaj kuni kaar~…æaan nu mar~…æi; u misimawaj maadiƒß tu mar~…æi matin…ô≈ã mikir~…æi≈ã tu dadak…ôpan tu mar~…æi sisa jamias…ôkaj tu mar~…æi madak…ôp ¶i niza najaj tu. matat…ôm…ô ¶ ƒß…ôn, tusaaj a mimar~…æiaj mar~…æar~…æijun mimar~…æi atu midak…ôp atu misimawaj, sakasiwaaj (nu wawaaj kina …ôn…ôm, nu masakapaƒßaj kina pituaj ) anu ¶ima ku jadaƒßaj a nipimar~…æi kujza ku kata î~ °. anu siwaaj ƒß…ôn kuni pimar~…æi mar~…æ…ô ¶a kuni mar~…æian, mur~…æiawa ¶a ƒßaj nika katukuƒß tu nika tad…ôm…ô ¶an tu kata î~ °. misas…ô≈ãiaj tu pa≈ã ¶iw u r~…æ…ôi ¶iw. nir~…æa ¶ur~…æ r~…æajr~…æaj u sasakamuwan tu nu mar~…æi, izaw ku kamu tu nu nimar~…æian sa musar~…æiwdaj a mar~…æi, nu amuƒßuan a kamu nu wawa a sapir~…æatr~…æat. u niki≈ãkiwan tu miƒß ¶aan sa, ar~…æaw katin…ô≈ãan u mar~…æi atu u sar~…æiwdaj a mar~…æi namakajni i d…ô≈ã ¶iw. **** a miƒß ¶aan, amuƒßuan nu pusidu≈ã taƒßkar~…æ ku ¶a ¶ajaj a mir~…æatr~…æataj a ¶udad, sakamu sa tu mar~…æi nu r~…æatr~…æat, ¶aaj kar~…æar~…æu ¶…ôk ku nisur~…æitan tu wajwaj. nu amuƒßuan a ƒßitaj ¶i abn…ôr doubr~…æ…ôdaj sar~…æu ¶…ôk sa misar~…æu ¶…ôk tu mar~…æi tu sajawaj, nika ¶aaj kar~…æu ¶…ôk musakamu, tina kawawan tu sasakamuwan ¶aaj kar~…æar~…æu ¶…ôk kina kamu, sisa najaj i r~…æajr~…æaj a ¶udad kina kawaw. **** a miƒß ¶aan, ar~…æ…ô*and…ôr ¶artwrigƒßt misur~…æit tu ¶udad nu r~…æatr~…æataj, sur~…æit saan tu nisur~…æitan, jadaƒß patad…ô≈ãaaj kina mar~…æian tu sajawaj kju mar~…æu ¶…ôk, tina kawaw tu sur~…æit izaw ku r~…æu ¶…ôkaj sa, u sakanamuƒßan tu nu ajdaaj a tad…ômaw kina r~…æatr~…æat tu mamar~…æian. **** a miƒß ¶aan, sajawaj mar~…æi≈ãatu misasur~…æit tu sapimatad…ôm…ô ¶aj a nipimar~…æi : n…ôw jork kni ¶k…ôrbo ¶k…ôrs atu n…ôw jork nin…ô*matad…ôm…ô ¶ i stat…ô of n…ôw *…ôrs…ô a …ôr~…æjsian a mamar~…æian. **** a miƒß ¶aan namakatimur~…æ mar~…æar~…æajis satu mamin sa, namakatimur~…æaj a amuƒßuan a tad…ômaw izaw tu ku masasud…ôm…ô ¶ tu mar~…æi, i mamar~…æian nu amuƒßuan katuud ku nu nakamuwan tu mar~…æi. **** a miƒß ¶aan, sajawaj nu mimar~…æiaj mapatid…ô≈ã ku ≈ãa≈ãan ƒßan tu *…ôds ƒßar~…ær~…æ of fam…ô ƒßosts *intag…ô(u ≈ãa≈ãan niza ajza ¶in ¶innati *…ôds). amuƒßuan izaw ku nipisar~…æamar~…æ tu nu dumaan a mar~…æi tu nu amuƒßuan, ¶aaj kar~…æ…ô ¶a ¶ad ku mipisar~…æamar~…æ, maƒßida nu sapadaj a mar~…æi.
S.FORM: pangciw u kamu nu Sakizaya, anu yakiw nu Lipun. kakiliman mimali tu pangciw u masakaputay a nipimali, sainayay a tademaw a sasiwaay tu tusaay a mimaliay i cacayay nu mamaliyan mimali. anu mipangciw tu ku mimaliay izaw ku midakepay izaw ku misimaway, anu midakapay matineng mimalit tu nipiwait tu malit maasek, anu makaasek maduba tu sakatukuh i sakasepat a Â£òÂåÖ, mamin dubaen tu katukuh i sayaway nu nipimalit cacayay kuni kaalaan nu mali; u misimaway maadih tu mali matineng mikiling tu dadakepan tu mali sisa yamiasekay tu mali madakep ci niza nayay tu. matatemec hen, tusaay a mimaliay malaliyun mimali atu midakep atu misimaway, sakasiwaay (nu wawaay kina enem, nu masakapahay kina pituay ) anu cima ku yadahay a nipimali kuyza ku kata'. anu siwaay hen kuni pimali maleca kuni malian, muliawaca hay nika katukuh tu nika tademecan tu kata'. misasengiay tu pangciw u leiciw. nilacul laylay u sasakamuwan tu nu mali, izaw ku kamu tu nu nimalian sa musaliwday a mali, nu Amuhuan a kamu nu wawa a sapilatlat. u nikingkiwan tu mihcaan sa, alaw katinengan u mali atu u saliwday a mali namakayni i dengciw. 1834 a mihcaan, Amuhuan nu pusidung tahkal ku cacayay a milatlatay a cudad, sakamu sa tu mali nu latlat, caay kalalucek ku nisulitan tu wayway. nu Amuhuan a hitay ci Abner Doubleday salucek sa misalucek tu mali tu sayaway, nika caay kalucek musakamu, tina kawawan tu sasakamuwan caay kalalucek kina kamu, sisa nayay i laylay a cudad kina kawaw. 1845 a mihcaan, Alexander Cartwright misulit tu cudad nu latlatay, sulit saan tu nisulitan, yadah patadengaay kina malian tu sayaway kyu malucek, tina kawaw tu sulit izaw ku lucekay sa, u sakanamuhan tu nu aydaay a tademaw kina latlat tu mamalian. 1846 a mihcaan, sayaway malingatu misasulit tu sapimatademecay a nipimali : New York Knickerbockers atu New York NineÔºõmatademec i State of New Jersey a Elysian a mamalian. 1865 a mihcaan namakatimul malalayis satu mamin sa, namakatimulay a Amuhuan a tademaw izaw tu ku masasudemec tu mali, i mamalian nu Amuhuan katuud ku nu nakamuwan tu mali. 1869 a mihcaan, sayaway nu mimaliay mapatideng ku ngangan han tu Reds Hall of Fame hosts Vintage(u ngangan niza ayza Cincinnati Reds). Amuhuan izaw ku nipisalamal tu nu dumaan a mali tu nu Amuhuan, caay kalecacad ku mipisalamal, mahida nu sapaday a mali.

mar~…æi nu r~…æatr~…æat, ¶aaj kar~…æar~…æu ¶…ôk ku nisur~…æitan tu wajwaj. nu amuƒßuan a ƒßitaj ¶i abn…ôr doubr~…æ…ôdaj sar~…æu ¶…ôk sa misar~…æu ¶…ôk tu mar~…æi tu sajawaj, nika ¶aaj kar~…æu ¶…ôk musakamu, tina kawawan tu sasakamuwan ¶aaj kar~…æar~…æu ¶…ôk kina kamu, sisa najaj i r~…æajr~…æaj a ¶udad kina kawaw. **** a miƒß ¶aan, ar~…æ…ô*and…ôr ¶artwrigƒßt misur~…æit tu ¶udad nu r~…æatr~…æataj, sur~…æit saan tu nisur~…æitan, jadaƒß patad…ô≈ãaaj kina mar~…æian tu sajawaj kju mar~…æu ¶…ôk, tina kawaw tu sur~…æit izaw ku r~…æu ¶…ôkaj sa, u sakanamuƒßan tu nu ajdaaj a tad…ômaw amuƒßuan katuud ku nu nakamuwan tu mar~…æi. **** a miƒß ¶aan, sajawaj nu mimar~…æiaj mapatid…ô≈ã ku ≈ãa≈ãan ƒßan tu *…ôds ƒßar~…ær~…æ of fam…ô ƒßosts *intag…ô(u ≈ãa≈ãan niza ajza ¶in ¶innati *…ôds). amuƒßuan izaw ku nipisar~…æamar~…æ tu nu dumaan a mar~…æi tu nu amuƒßuan, ¶aaj kar~…æ…ô ¶a ¶ad ku mipisar~…æamar~…æ, maƒßida nu sapadaj a mar~…æi.
